response.justification: Bogdan has a genuinely broad engineering career spanning 17+ years and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling, but the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with deep, demonstrable AI expertise capable of advising strategic customers and shaping platform strategy. His AI work is confined to roughly one year of MCP tooling at a single employer, with no evidence of shipped AI products at scale, recognized thought leadership in the AI space, or the advisory and influence footprint the role requires.
strengths: 17+ years of continuous hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Genuine entrepreneurial experience as a founder (GISCollective) and early-stage contributor across multiple startups
Recent first-hand exposure to agentic workflows and MCP infrastructure at re:cinq
concerns: AI depth is shallow and recent — approximately one year of AI-adjacent work with no demonstrated AI products shipped at scale
No advanced degree in AI or a related field, and no evidence of recognized external AI expertise (publications, keynotes, notable open-source AI contributions)
Career trajectory and current title (Senior Software Developer) are well below the Director-level IC seniority the role requires, with no indication of strategic customer advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Broad engineering experience and entrepreneurial background
